entry.title: New: CR 24-115 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 136, CD1 (2024), to establish a Climate Action and Resiliency Plan to guide County policy and actions to mitigate and adapt to climate-change effects, transition to 100-percent renewable energy, and achieve net-negative emissions.

Efficiency Solutions and Circular Systems Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
